subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at True home in Chicago, 1912-09-16
subcodes.first_line: Allah-u-Abha! Praise be to God! I have spent a number of days among you, associating with you in love
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @The Holy Spirit, @suffering and imprisonment, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity
